title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap Ollama models into any chain or agent.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (React/Flask) that talks to a local Ollama instance; imports GPT-style conversations.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI wrapper that adds conversation memory, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama supporting Kotlin, Scala, and Android; offers synchronous & reactive APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; includes Railtie for zero-config Rails integration.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chat interface with file upload, markdown rendering, and shared conversation links.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app (Rust + React) that bundles Ollama binaries for offline install.

title: ollama discord bot
summary: Python-based Discord bot that lets servers query local Ollama models with slash commands.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Official Nvidia GPU-enabled container image with CUDA 12 and automatic driver detection.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes or generate text blocks.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Bolt-js Slack bot that threads replies using Ollama; supports app mentions and DM workflows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio, serde, and native Windows/Mac/Linux builds.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama as a channel layer consumer with async views and admin panel.

title: ollama Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, and showcasing Ollama projects.
